units.source_text: 證券按固定息率計息，直⾄其⾸個重置⽇為⽌（除非先前已根據有關條款贖回）。倘未贖回，則該等證券將於隨後的五年期按各重置⽇的固定息率
units.translation_target_text: Securities bear interest at a fixed rate until their first reset date (unless previously redeemed in accordance with the relevant terms). If not redeemed, the securities will bear interest at a fixed rate on each reset date for subsequent five-year periods.

units.source_text: 綜合普通股權⼀級比率低於7%，或有可轉換證券將按預訂價格轉換為滙豐控股的繳⾜股款普通股。因此，根據該等證券的條款，倘滙豐的綜合普
units.translation_target_text: If the consolidated common equity Tier 1 ratio is less than 7%, the contingent convertible securities will be converted into fully paid ordinary shares of HSBC Holdings at a predetermined price. Accordingly, under the terms of these securities, if HSBC's consolidated average

Accordingly, under the terms of these securities, if HSBC's consolidated average

units.source_text: 通股權⼀級比率低於7%，將觸發該等證券按相關證券貨幣的固定合約轉換價轉換為普通股，並會作反攤薄調整。
units.translation_target_text: If the Tier 1 equity ratio is less than 7%, it will trigger the conversion of these securities into ordinary shares at a fixed contract conversion price in the currency of the relevant securities, and anti-dilutive adjustments will be made.
